subcodes.first_line: O descendants of His Holiness the Sacrifice and the late Haji Ali Khan, render thanks unto God that ye are of the progeny of these two [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسباط حضرت ذبیح و مرحوم حاجی علی خان شکر کنید خدا را که از اسباط این دو
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude
